function: () => { const panel = document.getElementById('draw-strength-panel'); if (!window.app?._simulateDrawStrength) return 'no sim'; window.app._simulateDrawStrength({ connected: true, draw_strength_source: '/p/app/htr/air', draw_strength_percent: 100, draw_strength_active: true, draw_strength_mode: 'dynamic_inhale', heat: 'HEATING' }); return new Promise(r => setTimeout(() => { panel.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'instant', block: 'center' }); r('set'); }, 500)); }
